body:
# All Most Hate The SUN

## Description

**All Most Hate The SUN** is a simple gameplay mod that makes hostile mobs vulnerable to sunlight, ensuring they burn during the day just like vanilla zombies and skeletons. This creates a more consistent and dangerous overworld experience where darkness truly belongs to the monsters.

### What It Does

**Enhanced Sun Damage**
- All hostile mobs (any entity implementing IMob) will burn when exposed to direct sunlight
- Sunlight damage is significantly increased compared to vanilla burning
- Mobs take 6 damage every second while burning in sunlight
- Burning persists as long as mobs remain in direct daylight

**Consistent Daytime Safety**
- Creates predictable daytime behavior across all hostile mob types
- Makes daylight hours genuinely safer for players
- Encourages strategic timing for exploration and combat

## Compatibility

- Minecraft 1.12.2
- Forge mod loader
- Works with any mod that adds hostile mobs implementing the standard IMob interface
description: All hostile mobs burn during daylight hours with increased sun damage.
title: All Most Hate The SUN
